body.title: CLOSED: wire spreading_activation heat_field into cortex.search priming
body.result: set_heat_field + _get_current_heat_field on Cortex; NE stashes after SA calls; search bumps hot candidates pre-Phase-2 and inside cosine scoring; 4415 tests pass
body.description:
cortex.spreading_activation() is called by NE every turn (for prediction-error training and coalition detection) but its heat_field output never primes cortex.search() candidate scores. True priming (doctor->nurse) is absent. Fix: NE stashes the heat_field on the cortex instance as _current_heat_field (dict[str, float]) with 60s TTL. cortex.search checks _current_heat_field; candidates with heat > 0 get a proportional relevance bump (max +0.10) before Phase 2 rerank. If heat_field is empty or expired, search is unchanged. Back-compat: new optional attribute, no signature change to existing callers.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/memory/cortex.py (_current_heat_field attribute + bump in search), wild_igor/igor/cognition/narrative_engine.py (stash heat_field after spreading_activation call)
**Design rules:** none-apply
**Scope boundary:** IN: stash heat_field on cortex; apply bump in search. OUT: do not change NE coalition detection, TWM push surface, or Phase 2 rerank behavior.
**Test plan:** test that search results are reranked when heat_field is populated; test that search is unchanged when heat_field is empty; test TTL expiry.
**Pass condition:** A node with high heat scores gets surfaced higher in cortex.search results than an equally-matched cold node; pytest passes.
